title: Sampling and estimation
summary: 9709 S2 — sampling distribution of the mean, CLT, and confidence intervals.
learningObjectives: Describe the sampling distribution of X̄.
Construct confidence intervals for a mean.

simpleExplanation.title: From sample to population
simpleExplanation.summary: The sample mean estimates μ. Its distribution has mean μ and variance σ²/n.
steps: X̄ has E = μ, Var = σ²/n.
CLT: X̄ ≈ N(μ, σ²/n) for large n.
Wider CI = more confidence, less precision.

sections.content: **Confidence intervals** (6.4) are high mark S2. Distinguish **population parameter** from **sample statistic** in wording.
